text: Overview – Siddhartha University Skip to content Search Search Overview Vision & Mission Sponsoring Body MoA Institute Development Plan Accreditations/Ranking Status Consituent Units Annual Reports (AQAR) Audit Reports Institution’s Innovation Council Overview The National Education Policy (NEP) 2020 envisions quality higher education as a means to develop thoughtful, well-rounded, and creative individuals, promoting deep specialization in chosen areas of study, coupled with the cultivation of character, ethical and constitutional values, intellectual curiosity, scientific temper, creativity, and a spirit of service. NEP 2020 advocates for a 21st-century skillset across various disciplines, including sciences, social sciences, arts, humanities, languages, and professional, technical, and vocational fields. The vision can be realized through higher educational institutions that operate with greater autonomy, address local challenges, empower communities, and encourage interdisciplinary and domain-specific specializations. By embracing NEP 2020, institutions can contribute to India’s Gross Enrollment Ratio (GER) in higher education, support initiatives like ‘Atmanirbhar Bharat,’ ‘Make in India,’ ‘Viksit Bharat @ 2047,’ and advance the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). In alignment with these objectives, Velagapudi Ramakrishna Siddhartha Engineering College (Autonomous), established in 1977, submitted an application to the UGC in January 2024 to be recognized as a deemed university. After fulfilling all statutory formalities as per UGC norms, it was declared a deemed university by the Ministry of Education, Government of India, vide notification dated 11-03-2024 Siddhartha Academy of General & Technical Education Siddhartha Academy of General and Technical Education (SAGTE), the Sponsoring Society (SAGTE) was established in the year 1975 in Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, SAGTE was established by 250 philanthropists with a mission to create educational institutions of excellence that embrace a holistic approach to general, technical, and professional education. Registered under the Andhra Pradesh Societies Registration Act XXI of 1860, SAGTE is a non-profit organization dedicated to the advancement of education at all levels. Since its inception, SAGTE has successfully established 18 institutions across various fields, including arts and sciences, engineering, medicine, dentistry, pharmacy, and hotel management. The Sponsoring Society is recognized as a Scientific and Industrial Research Organization (SIRO) by Department of Scientific & Industrial Research, Ministry of Science & Technology, Govt. of India, New Delhi. More than 90,000 students graduated from various academic programs and occupied prominent positions and are serving various organizations across the globe. Currently more than 24,600 students are studying in Siddhartha Institutions supported by 2000 experienced faculty. With this, one can understand that the Sponsoring Society envisaged, embarked upon and executed a grand plan of action aimed at comprehensive educational development of the region. With the evolving academic landscape and regulatory requirements, SAGTE established VR Siddhartha Engineering College as a deemed-to-be University to further its mission of providing impactful, innovative education. VR Siddhartha Engineering College - Autonomous Velagapudi Ramakrishna Siddhartha Engineering College (VRSEC) was the first private engineering college in the united Andhra Pradesh, founded in 1977. In 2024, VRSEC achieved deemed university status, marking a new era for the institution. With nine undergraduate and postgraduate programs in engineering, including B.Tech., MTech., MBA, and MCA, VRSEC has consistently upheld quality standards, being the first private engineering institution in the state to receive NBA accreditation in five cycles since 1998 and to adopt Outcome-Based Education (OBE) in 2013. The institute was reaccredited by NAAC with an ‘A+’ grade in 2021 and ISO 21001:2018 certified. The institute was conferred autonomous status in 2006 again in 2012 later it was extended from the UGC for an additional 10 years, up to 2028, without a peer team visit. VRSEC is recognized among India’s top engineering institutions by agencies like Outlook, Data Quest, and Careers 360. The college has consistently ranked within the top 200 in the NIRF rankings for the last seven years. Siddhartha Academy of Higher Education (Deemed-to-be University) In 2024, VR Siddhartha Engineering College was declared as a deemed-to-be university under Section 3 of the UGC Act, 1956 by Ministry of Education, Government of India. With a legacy of educational excellence, the institution’s UGC-granted autonomy, renewed through 2027-28, provides a strong foundation for its transformation. Guided by a detailed 15-year strategic vision and a 5-year rolling implementation plan, Siddhartha Academy of Higher Education focuses on key areas such as academics, faculty recruitment, student admissions, research, ICT infrastructure, and administration, with specific annual milestones and measurable outcomes. SAGTE, as a responsive educational trust, aligns with the Government of India’s target of achieving a 50% GER in higher education by 2035. Siddhartha Academy of Higher Education, Deemed-to-be University, offers diverse undergraduate and postgraduate programs through its specialized schools, including the School of Engineering (B.Tech., M.Tech.), School of Management (MBA), School of Law, School of Science (B.Sc., M.C.A.), and School of Arts & Commerce (B.Com.). Envisioned to support interdisciplinary and multidisciplinary education for students’ holistic development, the university aligns with the aspirations and requirements of NEP 2020 to equip students with the skills and knowledge essential for future growth and societal contributions. To be a Centre of Excellence in Education, Innovation and Research with Global presence in Arts, Science, Technology, Medicine, Management, Legal Studies and Social Studies in enriching the frontier areas of National and International Importance Vision To create a transformative educational experience for students focused on problem solving skills; communication abilities, and interpersonal relations and leadership. To cultivate a vibrant university community for attracting and retaining diverse, world-class talent creating a collaborative environment open to the free exchange of ideas where research, creativity, innovation and entrepreneurship can flourish and ensuring individuals to achieve their full potential To impact society in a pragmatic manner— regionally, nationally, and globally — by engaging with industry, outstanding national and international universities and research organizations To be a global University that nurtures excellence in education and innovation for creating a knowledgeable society Mission Siddhartha Academy, the Fountain Head Siddhartha Academy of General and Technical Education (SAGTE), the Sponsoring Society (SAGTE) was established in the year 1975 in Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, SAGTE was established by 250 philanthropists with a mission to create educational institutions of excellence that embrace a holistic approach to general, technical, and professional education. Registered under the Andhra Pradesh Societies Registration Act XXI of 1860, SAGTE is a non-profit organization dedicated to the advancement of education at all levels. Since its inception, SAGTE has successfully established 18 institutions across various fields, including arts and sciences, engineering, medicine, dentistry, pharmacy, and hotel management. The Sponsoring Society is recognized as a Scientific and Industrial Research Organization (SIRO) by Department of Scientific & Industrial Research, Ministry of Science & Technology, Govt. of India, New Delhi. More than 85,000 students graduated from various academic programs and occupied prominent positions and are serving various organizations across the globe. Currently more than 24,600 students are studying in Siddhartha Institutions supported by 1500 experienced faculty. With this, one can understand that the Sponsoring Society envisaged, embarked upon and executed a grand plan of action aimed at comprehensive educational development of the region. With the evolving academic landscape and regulatory requirements, SAGTE established Siddhartha Academy of Higher Education as a deemed-to-be University to further its mission of providing impactful, innovative education. Pioneering ventures are Siddhartha’s Pride First Private Engineering college in the composite state of AP(1977) First Private Medical college in the composite state of AP (established) by Siddhartha Academy was taken over by the then Govt. of AP 1981 The first Private PG centre in the Region (1987) The first Private Pharmacy college in the composite state of AP(1994) What we do Today, the Academy sponsors 3 Junior Colleges, 3 Degree Colleges (UG & PG), 2 Engineering Colleges, 1 Medical College, 1 Dental College, 1 Pharmacy College, 2 Nursing Institutions, 1 Law College, 1 College of Education, 1 Hotel Management College, 2 Public Schools and a Training centre for Civil Services Examination. In addition, the Academy runs a Kalapeetham which has been rendering yeoman service to the world of art and culture and a Foundation which financially supports the needy for the promotion of education. Siddhartha offers education to 21000 students out of which 11000 are boys and the rest are girls. The Academy has created employment in its educational institutions to more than 3200 people ranging from Doctorates to Matriculates and even below. 1500 strong teacher contingent and 1700 strong supporting staff happen to be the committed educational army of the Academy with noble and wise members of Governing body with their proven capabilities and highly reputed professional standing. Educational Institutions Sponsored by Society Assimilating the advances made in various areas of activity and considering the educational needs of the region, the following institutions have been established over the last four and half decades. 1975 Parvathaneni Brahmayya Siddhartha College of Arts & Science (1975) (Post Graduate Centre established in 1987 (The First Private PG Centre Locally) 1977 Veeeramachaneni Paddayya Siddhartha Public School 1979 Velagapudi Ramakrishna Siddhartha Engineering College (1977) (First Private Engineering College in the composite state of AP) and First institution in the private sector in the entire state to start M. Tech programmes (1999). 1982 Sri Durga Malleswara Siddhartha Mahila Kalasala (1982) 1984 V. Rao Siddhartha College of Education (1984) 1987 Velagapudi Durgamba Siddhartha Law College (1987) 1991 KCP Siddhartha Adarsh Residential Public School (1991) 1994 Kommareddy Venkata Sadasiva Rao Siddhartha College of Pharmaceutical Sciences (1994), First Private Pharmacy college in the state of A.P and First time in Andhra Pradesh, a Pharma Innovation and Incubation Centre (10,000 Sq. ft) built at the cost of over Rs.1.0 Crore 1998 Prasad V Potluri Siddhartha Institute of Technology (1998) 1975 G. & S.G. Siddhartha Arts & Science College, Vuyyuru (1975) 2001 Siddhartha Institute of Hotel Management & Catering Technology (2001) 2003 Pinnamaneni Siddhartha Institute of Medical Sciences & Research Foundation (2003). 2003 Siddhartha School of Nursing (2003) 2003 S. Sudha & Nageswara Rao Siddhartha Institute of Dental Sciences (2005) 2008 C. Sobhanadri Siddhartha College of Nursing (2008) In addition to the above, two service oriented organisations are established by Siddhartha Academy, namely, Siddhartha Kala Peetham and Siddhartha Foundation. Mummaneni Subbarao Siddhartha Kala Peetham: The Academy established ‘Siddhartha Kala Peetham’ in 1989 for the promotion of Indian arts and culture, which invites renowned artists across the globe to present their performances. Siddhartha Foundation: To grant scholarships to the needy and meritorious students irrespective of caste, creed, race or religion etc., for encouraging talent and prosper through higher education. Office Bearers of the Sponsoring Society There are seven office bearers of the sponsoring society, who are elected by the governing body members of the society (26 Nos) to look after the day to day affairs of all the institutions run by the society. Sri M. Rajayya President Sri. V. Nagabhushana Rao Vice-President Sri P. Lakshmana Rao Secretary Sri. S. Venkateswara Rao Treasurer Sri N. Lalitha Prasad Joint Secretary Sri. Sureddi Vishnu Joint Secretary View MoA Institute Development Plan Velagapudi Ramakrishna Siddhartha Engineering College (VRSEC), now Siddhartha Academy of Higher Education an institution Deemed to be University, has been a pioneer in engineering education in Andhra Pradesh. As it moves forward, the Institute Development Plan focuses on enhancing academic excellence, expanding research, and strengthening infrastructure. This includes updating curricula to reflect global technological trends, offering interdisciplinary programs, and enhancing faculty qualifications. The university aims for international accreditations, faculty development, and closer industry collaborations to ensure that students are prepared for modern challenges. Research will be bolstered through new centers of excellence, enhanced funding, and a focus on intellectual property generation. The plan also emphasizes holistic student development, with initiatives such as skill development programs, entrepreneurship support, and extracurricular engagement through clubs and sports. A smart campus with state-of-the-art facilities, including smart classrooms and eco-friendly infrastructure, is also a priority. Additionally, the university aims to increase its social impact through community outreach programs and sustainability efforts. Financially, VRSEC seeks to diversify its revenue streams through corporate sponsorships, online programs, and expanding alumni engagement. Overall, the plan positions VRSEC for growth and leadership in higher education, focusing on quality, innovation, and societal contribution. Key Objectives For effective implementation of NEP 2020 Be a part of increasing Gross Enrolment Ratio to 50% by 2035 Be a part of Sustainable Development Goals – UN member countries To move towards more multidisciplinary education by developing and offering cutting edge and demand driven educational programs in various disciplines of knowledge through advanced laboratories and to start even new Institutions as per the need of the community & Industry. To introduce required Certificate/Diploma and Skill Development programs to create better employability, establishing start-ups and to encourage entrepreneurship among students by exercising the opportunity of enhanced autonomy by instituting appropriate linkages/ MoUs with the industry & organisations for skill development centres. To collaborate with other reputed Universities in India and abroad, Research Institutions, Government, Non-Government organization, foreign universities and industry towards fulfilment of objectives of the proposed deemed to be University. To create centers of excellence for research and development and for sharing knowledge and their applications. To enhance the access, equity and inclusion. Focuses on the increase of quality students to support research, innovation and creative activities in the university Provide support to students that ensures Placement in Premier organisations Maintain good relations and work with an association of alumni for the development of the University. Provide required infrastructure to meet the needs of above objectives and goals. Affiliations, Recognition & Approvals Velagapudi Ramakrishna Siddhartha Engineering College has been declared a Siddhartha Academy of Higher Education an institution Deemed to be University by the Ministry of Education, Government of India, as per the notification dated 11-03-2024. Currently the University has no constituent units. Annual Reports The annual quality assurance report is a self – reviewed progress report on the following criteria: Criterion – I: Curricular Aspects Criterion – II: Teaching, Learning and Evaluation Criterion – III: Research, Consultancy and Extension Criterion – IV: Infrastructure and Learning Resources Criterion – V: Student Support and Progression Criterion – VI: Governance, Leadership and Management Criterion – VII: Innovations and Best Practices The report is to detail the tangible results achieved in key areas, specifically identified by the institutional IQAC at the beginning of the academic year. The AQAR will detail the results of the perspective plan worked out by the IQAC. Velagapudi Ramakrishna Siddhartha Engineering College has been declared a Siddhartha Academy of Higher Education an institution Deemed to be University by the Ministry of Education, Government of India, as per the notification dated 11-03-2024. 2023-24 2022-23 2021-22 2020-21 2019-20 Audit Reports The audit reports of Sidhardha University provide a transparent and detailed overview of the institution’s financial health and operational compliance. These reports include evaluations of financial transactions, resource utilization, regulatory adherence, and risk management.
